evals.name: python-package
evals.prompt: Generate a project wiki for the mempalace package at portable-kit/mempalace. Use the default Midnight theme and single-file mode. Save it to /tmp/wiki-mempalace.html and open it.
evals.expected_output: Self-contained .html file at /tmp/wiki-mempalace.html (~1-2 MB). verify.py passes. Overview hero shows 'mempalace'. Languages breakdown includes Python. README rendered. Dependencies page shows pyproject.toml parsed.

evals.name: rust-monorepo
evals.prompt: Build a wiki for portable-kit/runtime — it's a Rust workspace with multiple crates. Use folder mode so I can host it. I want to see the dependency graph and git activity.
evals.expected_output: Wiki folder at the chosen output path. Dependencies page parses Cargo.toml from each crate. Force-directed graph shows multiple crates. If git history exists, activity heatmap shows it. verify.py passes in folder mode.

evals.name: minimal-no-git
evals.prompt: Make a wiki for /tmp/empty-test (a directory with just a README.md and one Python file, no git history). Use Aurora theme.
evals.expected_output: Wiki generates without errors. Activity page shows 'no git history' empty state. Overview shows the README. Stats show file_count=2. Theme is Aurora (purple/teal). Single-file output.
